OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2011 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ellen Chaitin.; Clerk: Kevin Dougherty; Not Reported. (D514)
Appearances:

Michael A. Sherwood, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Community Housing Partnership, A California Nonprofit Corporation.
Aaron A. Farmer, Esq. appeared with defendant Elena Segon Peniche through through limited scope representation.
Judge Ellen Chaitin, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 514 for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed Stipulation for Entry of Judgment or For Dismissal of Action with Prejudice which was NOT filed, and the original was maintained by counsel for plaintiff, Michael Rossoff.

This case settled, the trial date of May 16, 2011 is VACATED.
